name: qa-planner
description: Portable QA planning plugin for converting requirements into planning_state JSON, test plans, test cases, coverage maps, review feedback, and downstream handoff contracts, with conditional Plane MCP integration for work items, comments, activities, relations, pages, links, states, and handoff tracker items.

interface.shortDescription: Create QA plans from requirements or Plane cards.
interface.longDescription: QA Planner provides portable QA planning for normalizing requirements, resolving blocking ambiguity and conflicting sources without unsupported assumptions, creating deterministic planning_state JSON, rendering test plans, coverage maps, and test cases from the Template Test Case field model, managing OK/NOK and partial review loops, handling large inputs incrementally, and producing governed handoff contracts for qa-executor, qa-automation, and qa-reporter. Plane.so MCP integration is documented as a conditional reference loaded only for Plane inputs, including live work item retrieval, comments, activities, relations, project metadata, pages, links, status movement, and optional execution tracker handoff items.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-planner to create a QA planning package from requirements or a Plane work item.
